_comment: Image inventory. To replace an image: update 'src' to your new file path. All paths are relative to /website/. External URLs (Unsplash) can be swapped for local files.
_howToReplace: 1. Copy new image to /website/assets/  2. Update 'src' below  3. Rebuild/refresh
